channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇵🇭 7.8 Magnitude Quake Kills at Least 12 in Philippines
item.description: A powerful offshore earthquake struck Mindanao, killing at least 12 people, injuring 200+, and triggering a 1-meter tsunami. The strongest quake to hit the Philippines this year caused building collapses in General Santos city.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵 Xi Visits North Korea for First Time in 7 Years
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping arrived in Pyongyang for a rare state visit, his first in seven years. The summit with Kim Jong Un aims to reassert China's influence over North Korea amid separate confrontations with the US.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇮🇷 Israel Strikes Iran After Missile Attack, Imperiling Ceasefire
item.description: Israel launched airstrikes on Iranian targets following a missile attack from Tehran, threatening to unravel the fragile ceasefire brokered by the US. The escalation marks the first major breach of the April 8 peace deal.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian drone strike kills one in Russian-annexed Crimea
item.description: A Ukrainian drone struck a train in Crimea, killing its assistant driver and injuring the driver. The attack highlights ongoing Ukrainian strikes deep in Russian-occupied territories.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Xi Jinping hails new era in China-North Korea ties ahead of Pyongyang summit
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping said ties with North Korea are at a "new historical starting point" before his arrival in Pyongyang for a rare summit with Kim Jong Un, aiming to counter US influence.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese military hovered as global executives flocked to Taiwan tech show
item.description: As AI heavyweights including Nvidia, Intel and SK Group championed Taiwan's significance as a crucial hub for the global supply chain, a hostile exchange with China was brewing at sea.

item.title: 🛢️ Hormuz Strait will be open with transit fees, Iran envoy in Moscow says
item.description: Iran's envoy in Moscow said the strategic Strait of Hormuz would remain open but with transit fees imposed, a significant development for global oil shipping amid the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran-Israel ceasefire announced by Trump
item.description: Israel launched airstrikes targeting central and western Iran in response to Iranian missile attacks. The ceasefire announcement comes amid escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇰🇷 Korea Herald: North Korea military cooperation with Russia deepens
item.description: North Korea continues to deepen military cooperation with Russia, supplying troops and weapons for the Ukraine war in exchange for economic and military assistance.

item.title: 🇰🇭 Cambodia's war on scam centers misses targets, victims - Amnesty
item.description: Amnesty International reports that Cambodia's crackdown on scam centers is failing to protect victims and missing the real targets, as cyber-scam operations continue to exploit workers.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran war updates: Day 100 marked by escalation
item.description: Day 100 of the Iran-Israel conflict has left the region in a tinderbox that could be about to explode, with escalating strikes and counter-strikes threatening broader regional war.

item.title: 💵 Dollar climbs to two-month peak as Fed hike bets ramp up
item.description: The US dollar reached a two-month high as markets bet on Federal Reserve interest rate increases amid persistent inflation concerns and geopolitical uncertainty.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China exports set for strong May on front-loaded orders, chip demand
item.description: China's exports are expected to show strong growth in May as companies front-loaded orders amid tariff concerns, with semiconductor demand driving much of the increase.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel hits Iran petrochemical plant despite Trump reprimand
item.description: Israel struck an Iranian petrochemical facility, the first hit on an energy site inside Iran since the April 8 ceasefire, despite Trump's calls for restraint.

item.title: 🌊 Tsunami warnings issued after 8.2 magnitude earthquake off Philippines
item.description: A powerful magnitude 8.2 earthquake struck off the southern Philippines, triggering tsunami warnings across the region and prompting coastal evacuations.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Zelensky arrives in London for bilateral E3 talks
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky arrived in London for talks with European leaders as Ukraine seeks continued support amid the ongoing conflict with Russia.

item.title: ⚔️ IRGC says Israel used air-launched ballistic missiles on targets in Iran
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard claimed Israel used air-launched ballistic missiles in its latest strikes on Iranian targets, marking an escalation in the conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesia: Political heavyweights smell opportunity as Prabowo falters
item.description: As Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto's administration faces challenges, political heavyweights in the country see an opening to advance their positions ahead of future elections.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines verifying reports of at least five deaths after magnitude 7.8 quake
item.description: Philippine authorities were verifying reports of at least five deaths after a magnitude 7.8 earthquake struck the southern region of Mindanao early Monday.

item.title: 🇦🇲 Armenia's ruling party leads parliamentary vote with 57%
item.description: Armenian Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan's ruling party, Civil Contract, was leading with 57% in early parliamentary election results, according to the Central Election Commission.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC+ approves fourth oil output quota hike since Hormuz closure
item.description: OPEC+ agreed on a fourth increase in oil output targets in as many months, even though the US conflict with Iran continues to prevent some members from pumping more.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine war: Starmer, Merz, Macron meet with Zelensky in London
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer, German Chancellor Friedrich Merz, and French President Emmanuel Macron met with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky in London for talks on continued European support.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea: Corporate developments amid regional tensions
item.description: South Korean corporations continue to navigate challenges amid regional tensions and global supply chain disruptions affecting the semiconductor industry.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia: Military losses in Ukraine reach 1.37 million since Feb 2022
item.description: The Ukrainian General Staff reports Russian military casualties have reached approximately 1,374,950 troops since the beginning of the full-scale invasion on February 24, 2022.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US plans to use frozen Iranian assets to compensate Gulf states for damage
item.description: The US government plans to use frozen Iranian assets to repair damage caused by Iran on Gulf states, as the conflict continues to reshape regional financial dynamics.
